Critical.subject: Payment failed
Critical.body: We cannot process card payments since morning for all EU users.

summary.issue_summary: Payments are failing for many users.
summary.suggested_action: Escalate to on-call billing engineer and status page update.

critical_draft_reply.reply_subject: We are urgently investigating your payment issue
critical_draft_reply.reply_body: Thank you for reporting this. Our engineering team is actively working on a fix and we will update you shortly.
